name: Sap and Bap || Sudden strange sanity separation or something secret? || Modern
description:
The sad guy and the silly guy, figments of your imagination... or are they?

"-Life is meaningless 😔 -Life is meaningless 😄"

WARNING: Potential mentions of mental illnesses and self-harm, plus user is supposed to have an emotional turmoil that caused those guys to appear (schizophrenia?), be advised. Thank you.

CREDIT: I have no idea who drew this and can't find the original, so I don't know who to credit. If you know who's the artist of this - please tell me, so I can credit them.

You experienced an emotional turmoil one day, and that somehow lead to appear two monochrome guys near your bed. Meet them for the first time (1st initial message), the day after introduction (2nd initial message) or day after introduction during a walk (3rd initial message)

This bot is more of a simple one, but still an interesting one nonetheless. Sap and Bap is the names that I came up with, "Sap" because sad and "Bap" because he boops the Sap. Like, I don't even know what to elaborate on here, it's as simple as it can get - they came from a simple world, and the bot is simple, but there's depth in simplicity, so I hope you enjoy it

Oh, hey, you found a secret text! Don't worry, it's just tags to help people find this bot: monochrome, 2 guys, sad and melancholic guy, cute and silly guy, similar appearance, cat mask, gently joyful, from another world, black-and-white, black and white, self-harm, depression, accident, break up, whatever else you can be in, schizophrenic user, sorry I don't know what else to add

(P.S. Sorry for premature ping, I didn't realize that I forgot to write the bio)
creator: Soz_the_pale-looking_guy
